## What changed

Describe the behavior change and the user or contributor problem it solves.

## Verification

List the exact commands and manual checks you ran.

```text
./scripts/verify-local.sh
```

## Compatibility and data integrity

- [ ] I checked native workbook save and reopen behavior when persistence changed.
- [ ] I checked XLSX, CSV, JSON, or PDF behavior when a file boundary changed.
- [ ] I added or updated a minimal fixture for a compatibility regression.
- [ ] I documented any behavior that is intentionally unsupported.

## Public repository hygiene

- [ ] Tests cover the change.
- [ ] User or contributor documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] New prose contains no em dashes.
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, local machine paths, private files, or generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] The change is focused and does not overwrite unrelated work.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible interface changes. Remove private workbook content before attaching images.
